Class GameScene

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.StackPane
gui.GameScene
All Implemented Interfaces:
RunAfterChange, javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class GameScene extends javafx.scene.layout.StackPane implements RunAfterChange
The main game's UI. Consists of rooms and HUD (head up display).

  • Property Summary

    static void
    resetUi()
    Reset UI by Update Timer UI Update Cash UI Update day count Remove all order paper inside HUD Remove return to main menu panel from HUD Remove sleep confirmation panel from HUD Reset shop's ingredient order UI Close unclosed PC shop UI and Cookbook UI Set Cookbook UI index to 0

      private GameScene()
      Constructs the game scene.

  • Method Details

    • getUi

      public static GameScene getUi()
      Getter for GameScene UI singleton
      Returns:
      GameScene UI singleton

    • resetUi

      public static void resetUi()
      Reset UI by
      • Update Timer UI
      • Update Cash UI
      • Update day count
      • Remove all order paper inside HUD
      • Remove return to main menu panel from HUD
      • Remove sleep confirmation panel from HUD
      • Reset shop's ingredient order UI
      • Close unclosed PC shop UI and Cookbook UI
      • Set Cookbook UI index to 0

    • playFadeInAnimation

      private void playFadeInAnimation()
      Plays fade in animation of the scene

    • getTestUi

      public static GameScene getTestUi()
      Getter for GameScen UI for JUnit test
      Returns:
      GameScene UI

    • updateDayCount

      public static void updateDayCount()
      Update day count UI

      method called by SceneManager after the scene is changed to the RunAfterChange Scene.

      runAfter in interface RunAfterChange

    • createIngredientBuyer

      private void createIngredientBuyer(javafx.scene.layout.GridPane gridPane, int rowNumber, String displayImageURL, ItemSpriteType itemSpriteType)
      Creates an ingredient buyer row in the given grid pane.
      Parameters:
      gridPane - the grid pane
      rowNumber - the row index
      displayImageURL - the image URL for the ingredient
      itemSpriteType - the type of the item sprite

      private void changeCookBookPage(javafx.scene.image.ImageView cookBookImgView, WalkDirection direction)

      Parameters:
      cookBookImgView - the ImageView displaying the cookbook
      direction - the direction to turn the page

      public void sleep()
      Open sleep confirmation panel

    • updateIngredientOrderUI

      public void updateIngredientOrderUI(ItemSpriteType itemSpriteType, String displayImageURL)
      Update the PC shop UI's undelivered ingredient order list.
      Parameters:
      itemSpriteType - ItemSpriteType that is being added to order
      displayImageURL - display image URL of the ItemSprite
